mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `skill` WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM `skill` WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM `skill` WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM `skill` WHERE public = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM `skill` ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE `skill` SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, type = #{type}, category = #{category}, inputs_schema = #{inputsSchema}, outputs_schema = #{outputsSchema}, version = #{version}, creator_id = #{creatorId}, public = #{isPublic}, verified = #{verified}, usage_count = #{usageCount}, download_count = #{downloadCount}, rating_sum = #{ratingSum}, rating_count = #{ratingCount}, tags = #{tags}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
